3175200.name: GONE: Game of Necromancy Education Demo
3175200.description:
GONE is a casual strategy game where you step into the shoes of a novice necromancer. Your mission? To earn your necromancer degree.

Gameplay:

Levels:

The game features multiple levels, each presenting a unique challenge.
Objectives:

Primary Objective: Eliminate all goblins in each level, before being overrun.
Secondary Objective: Complete the level with the lowest score possible.
Tools and Weapons:

Players can utilize undead spells.
Strategic planning is key. Carefully decide how to use each tool to maximize your effectiveness.
Challenges:

As you progress, levels become increasingly difficult, demanding more sophisticated strategies.

Rewards:

Earn points for each goblin you defeat.

Graphics and Sound:

Enjoy detailed, cartoon-style graphics.

Storyline:

Follow a loose narrative where you, a budding necromancer, face various tests from the mage college in your quest to earn a necromancer degree.
Prepare for a fun and strategic adventure in GONE, where your necromantic skills will be put to the ultimate test!
